case_title: JIN MEI ZHONG VS. FOX RENT A CAR et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-04-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-17-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING APR-14-2015 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. GOVERNMENT CODE 68608(B). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-15-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Government Code 68608(b). JUDGE: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk EBura; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2015 Continued To Apr-14-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to APR-14-2015 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)
